creator: matias@pizarro.net
text: I was still having this problem on 13-CURRENT r340703 ( https://svnweb.freebsd.org/base?view=revision&revision=340703 ). But that was nearly 6 days ago, I have not tested further down the 13-CURRENT development branch and, as you said, there's been quite a few ACPI-related commits since then
